##NAMES=Wurtzite
##RRUFFID=R130069
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=ZnS
##LOCALITY=Merelani Hills (Mererani), Lelatema Mountains, Arusha Region, Tanzania
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=William W. Pinch
##DESCRIPTION=Reddish brown blocky crystals, polytype wurtzite-4H
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R130069
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 3.849 b: 3.849 c: 12.575 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 120 volume: 161.34 crystal system: hexagonal
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
